resultList.dtldesc: An exceptionally designed this bright, spacious, comfortable and welcoming 3 BHK flat is up for sale in Uttari Pitampura, New Delhi. If you are willing to live a gracious lifestyle, then this abode is worth considering. Property specificationApproved by the Delhi Development Authority, this north east facing abode is preferably placed on the 2nd floor and enjoys ample fresh air all day long. Spanning across a super area of 1450 sq ft, this abode features 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, 4 balconies, a living cum dining area, kitchen and a store room. For properly organizing your clothes and other valuable essentials, the bedrooms are decked with fancy wardrobes. Both the bathrooms are available for common use, where in, 1 feature Indian toilet, while the other is fashioned in a western manner. Also, for instant supply of hot water, 1 of the bathrooms is equipped with a geyser. The living cum dining area opens on to a balcony, where you can enjoy the evening by a cup of tea or coffee. Further, the other 3 balconies are linked with the bedrooms separately. You will surely enjoy the cooking, as the modular kitchen of this flat is complete with storage cabinets and gas pipeline. This flat is fully refurnished with marble tiles, new pipes, and new gas pipeline, which is an added advantage. FacilitiesKey amenities such as a playground for children and garden for walking and jogging are provided here. Also, 1 covered and 1 open paring space, 24 hours water supply, and tight security with CCTV cameras are some of the basic facilities provided here. LocalityThe national highway is located just 4 km away from this property and also various schools are located within the vicinity. The nearest hospital is located within 3 to 4 min walk, while the MAX Hospital, Apollo Hospital and Santom Hospital are located within 15 min drive. The PVR Cinema, DDA Market and the Pitam Pura Metro Station is sited close by.

resultList.dtldesc: Discover refined urban living with this spacious 3 BHK residence nestled within Sector 111, Gurgaon, one of the most promising residential corridors in the Delhi NCR region. Situated in the well-planned development of Tashee Capital Gateway, this ready-to-move-in apartment offers a perfect blend of comfort, functionality, and modern lifestyle appeal. Positioned on the 4th floor of a 14-storey tower, the home enjoys ample natural light and ventilation, making it ideal for families seeking a balanced and serene environment within a thriving neighbourhood.Property SpecificationsSpread across a generous super built-up area of 1874 sq. ft, the apartment features a thoughtfully designed layout comprising three well-proportioned bedrooms, three bathrooms, and three balconies that extend the living space while offering pleasant outdoor views. The interiors are currently unfurnished, providing a blank canvas for personalisation according to your taste and lifestyle preferences. The spacious living and dining areas ensure seamless movement and comfort, while the overall layout promotes efficient utilisation of space. Being a newly constructed property, it reflects contemporary architecture and structural quality, making it a valuable long-term investment.FacilitiesResidents of this development benefit from essential modern amenities designed to enhance everyday living. The property includes power backup, reserved parking, and round-the-clock security, ensuring both convenience and safety. The presence of lifts and well-maintained common areas further adds to the overall living experience. Additionally, the project is designed to cater to family-friendly living, with provisions such as a kids club and recreational spaces that support a balanced lifestyle within the premises.LocalityLocated strategically in Sector 111, the property enjoys excellent connectivity to major parts of Gurgaon and Delhi, particularly via the Dwarka Expressway. The area is rapidly developing into a prime residential hub with proximity to reputed schools, healthcare facilities, shopping centres, and daily conveniences. Its connectivity to IGI Airport and key commercial zones makes it especially attractive for professionals and families alike. The neighbourhood offers a harmonious mix of urban infrastructure and peaceful surroundings, ensuring a comfortable and well-connected lifestyle.This apartment presents a compelling opportunity for homebuyers looking for a spacious, modern residence in a high-growth location within Gurgaon.

The apartment provides a peaceful yet connected lifestyle for discerning families.
